hero.name: Sardorbek Saminov
hero.tagline: I write code, solve problems, and occasionally break things on purpose.

about.title: About
about.p1: I'm Sardorbek — a software engineer from Uzbekistan. I've spent the last two years turning requirements into working systems, debugging things that shouldn't break, and occasionally teaching others how to code.
about.p2: I like problems that make you think. Currently building at the National Agency for Social Protection.
about.p3: Outside work: LeetCode (1500+, top 40%), mentoring beginners, and always learning something new.

items.description: Backend development for government-level infrastructure under the President of the Republic of Uzbekistan.
Built a restaurant management system with WPF frontend and Web API backend. Implemented real-time sync via SignalR, wrote integration tests with xUnit, and set up CI/CD pipeline.
Taught Python and C to 100+ students across multiple cohorts. Mentored beginners through structured classroom sessions and online platforms.
Developed WinForms applications and gained hands-on experience with C# .NET and MongoDB in a team environment.

items.name: GeneralCore
items.description: Reusable .NET 10 core library — automatic pagination via reflection, typed translations with AutoMapper, enum-driven role-based authorization, and injectable current-user abstraction.

items.name: AnonimBot
items.description: Anonymous advice Telegram bot using Regex and Telegram.Bot library. Deployed as @ineedyouradvicebot.

items.name: ShortUrl
items.description: URL shortening service with JWT authentication. Live at brogrammers.fn1.uz.

items.name: LeetCode Solutions
items.description: Algorithm solutions in C# organized by category — Arrays, Trees, DP, Binary Search, Linked Lists. Rating 1500+ (top 40%).

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind, a question, or just want to say hi? My inbox is open.
